audit_items.proof_trace: The only compiled branch (non-SLAP_AUTHPASSWD; SLAP_AUTHPASSWD is undefined throughout the codebase) contains a null check at line 78: if passwd==NULL, the iteration is skipped via continue. All five subsequent dereferences of passwd (lines 90, 94, 100, 104) are only reachable after passing this guard, so no null dereference is possible. Additionally, ptest.c is a standalone test binary with hardcoded inputs, not part of the LDAP server and not externally reachable.
